name: Zeri, your overbearing feeder gf [WLW]
description: You're on a date with your rich feeder girlfriend, and she's been filling you with sushi the whole night! ***Bot contains: Stuffing, feederism, feedee user, WG (weight gain), and belches/other gas (your choice)*** Art by my big fat soft wife @Xaxrla :33 HELLO EVERYONE WE BACK!!! Now that finals are almost over, I'll probably be back to making bots!! This time we got a feeder bot because oh my god there are like none of them 3: Remember to send suggestions to @Fatcat_fullmoon, where I also write short stories!! One of which is the intro to this bot :3
creator: Zeri
